allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
✨ feat\(static\): add static file serving with configurable extensions

Implement comprehensive static file serving with:
- Support for 21 file types \(CSS, JS, images, fonts, media\)
- Automatic MIME type detection
- HTTP caching with ETag and Last-Modified
- 304 Not Modified responses for conditional requests
- Development mode with cache disabled
- Production mode with 1-day cache strategy
- Configurable file extension whitelist via config.json
- Security: extension whitelist, path traversal protection
- 27 unit tests covering all functionality

Added files:
- src/static.ts: Core static file serving module
- tests/unit/static_test.ts: Comprehensive test suite
- docs/features/static-files.md: Complete documentation
- www/static/example.css: Example static file
- www/static-demo.tsx: Demo page showing usage

Modified files:
- src/main.ts: Integrate static file serving in request pipeline
- src/router.ts: Add static extension support to routing
- config.example.jsonc: Add staticExtensions configuration
- deno.json: Add static.ts to type check

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
